Well. You’ve been kidnapped. Long-story-short you were just walking down the side walk and you were snatched up in a white van. The next thing |you knew you’re in some guy’s basement. He’s tied you up and you’re currently waiting for what your captor has in store for you. There doesn’t seem like much escaping to be doing.

Where is there to go? What is there to do?
